title: strychnos innocua
intro: Strychnos innocua is a plant species belonging to the Loganiaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Traditionally, Strychnos innocua has been used in herbal preparations to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. The plant's extracts are often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
